sys_script_include.description:
2.8.5 | 2024-12-05 | RAJ | ServiceNow Certifier Update - Modified to use GlideStringUtil.escapeQueryTermSeparator 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.7.101 | 2021-12-23 | raj | DFCT0010729 - Shared Attachment - Only Tasker Application Admin is able to upload documents to Shared Attachment.
This function contains methods for task tree ACLs
sys_script_include.name: TaskTreeACLs
